llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the agenda were announced. The president stated 'Hearing none' when asked 'And are there any changes to the agenda?'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: If there are no questions or comments, can I please get a motion to. So moved. I'll second. All those in favor.
